title: Blind's Music Discs - MusicPack
description: Resource pack to enable music on the discs in Blind's Music Discs
body:
**All Music is by C418**

A pack to enable the music in 
[Blind's Music Discs](https://modrinth.com/mod/blinds-music-discs),\
If you want to use custom music replace the audio files in the pack with your own ones.
